title: Define Wave 22 manager portfolio filters and pagination contract
description: Extend architecture docs with manager portfolio query contract, deterministic pagination metadata, filter taxonomy, and UI state map for list refresh and empty/error states.
acceptance_criteria: Contract defines portfolio query params for search, status, city, page, and per_page
Contract defines deterministic meta payload for pagination and aggregate counters
UX map defines initial load, filter apply, clear filter, empty result, and error transitions
